diagrams.title: Power/Interest Grid
diagrams.description: 2x2 matrix showing stakeholder classification based on power (influence) and interest levels
elements: High Power/High Interest quadrant - Manage Closely
High Power/Low Interest quadrant - Keep Satisfied
Low Power/High Interest quadrant - Keep Informed
diagrams.purpose: Helps project managers prioritize stakeholder engagement efforts based on influence and interest

diagrams.title: Stakeholder Categories
diagrams.description: Hierarchical classification of stakeholders in software projects
elements: Internal Stakeholders: Team members, managers, executives
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different types of stakeholders and their roles

diagrams.title: Stakeholder Management Process Flow
diagrams.description: Cyclical process showing key activities in stakeholder management
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the continuous nature of stakeholder management throughout project lifecycle
